subject: USE_L10N setting
truth: Stop using USE_L10N setting; localization is always enabled and cannot be disabled.
quote: The `USE_L10N` setting is removed (localization is always enabled).

subject: USE_DEPRECATED_PYTZ setting and pytz support
old: USE_DEPRECATED_PYTZ setting and pytz timezone support
truth: Stop using USE_DEPRECATED_PYTZ and pytz timezones; use zoneinfo instead.
quote: The `USE_DEPRECATED_PYTZ` transitional setting and support for pytz timezones are removed; use `zoneinfo`.

from_fact: use_deprecated_pytz setting and pytz timezone support

subject: django.utils.timezone.utc alias
truth: Stop using django.utils.timezone.utc; use datetime.timezone.utc instead.

subject: is_dst argument on QuerySet.datetimes(), make_aware(), Trunc
truth: Stop passing is_dst argument to QuerySet.datetimes(), django.utils.timezone.make_aware(), and Trunc functions.
quote: The `is_dst` argument is removed from `QuerySet.datetimes()`, `django.utils.timezone.make_aware()`, and the `Trunc` functions.

subject: PickleSerializer
truth: Stop using PickleSerializer for sessions; it has been removed.

subject: CryptPasswordHasher
truth: Stop using CryptPasswordHasher for password hashing; it has been removed.

subject: django.utils.baseconv and django.utils.datetime_safe modules
truth: Stop importing from django.utils.baseconv and django.utils.datetime_safe; both modules are removed.

subject: GET logout in LogoutView and logout_then_login()
old: Logging out via GET requests in LogoutView and logout_then_login()
truth: Stop logging out via GET requests in LogoutView and logout_then_login(); only POST logout is supported.
quote: Support for logging out via GET requests in `LogoutView` and `logout_then_login()` is removed.

from_fact: logging out via get requests in logoutview and logout_then_login()

subject: default.html form templates
truth: Stop relying on default.html form templates; default rendering changed to div-based templates.
quote: The default form and formset rendering changed to div-based templates; the `default.html` form templates are removed.

subject: SERIALIZE test setting
truth: Stop using the SERIALIZE test setting; it has been removed.

subject: name argument of cached_property()
truth: Stop passing the name argument to cached_property(); it has been removed.

subject: default USE_TZ setting
truth: USE_TZ now defaults to True; naive datetimes will raise warnings or errors if used with timezone-aware operations.

subject: default sitemap protocol
truth: Sitemap protocol now defaults to https instead of http; sitemap URLs will be generated with https.
quote: The default sitemap protocol changed from `http` to `https`.

subject: XOR operator ^ on QuerySets
old: ^ returned rows matched by exactly one operand
new: ^ returns rows matched by an odd number of operands
truth: The XOR operator ^ on QuerySets now returns rows matched by an odd number of operands instead of exactly one.
quote: The XOR operator `^` now returns rows matched by an odd number of operands instead of exactly one.

from_fact: ^ returned rows matched by exactly one operand
^ returns rows matched by an odd number of operands

subject: AlreadyRegistered and NotRegistered exception locations
truth: AlreadyRegistered and NotRegistered exceptions moved from django.contrib.admin.sites to django.contrib.admin.exceptions; update imports.

subject: minimum SQLite and MySQL versions
truth: Minimum SQLite version is now 3.27.0 and minimum MySQL is now 8.0.11; older versions are unsupported.
quote: The minimum SQLite version increased to 3.27.0 and minimum MySQL to 8.0.11.
